SELECT url, sys.getanchor(url) AS anchor FROM test_urls WHERE url IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_urls WHERE sys.getanchor(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE sys.getanchor(url) = 'anchor1';
CREATE TABLE additional_data (url CLOB, description VARCHAR(255));
SELECT a.url, sys.getanchor(a.url) FROM additional_data a JOIN test_urls t ON a.url = t.url;
SELECT a.url, sys.getanchor(a.url) AS anchor FROM additional_data a WHERE sys.getanchor(a.url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sys.getanchor(CONCAT(url, '#new_anchor')) FROM test_urls WHERE url IS NOT NULL;
